Levels.online follow-up: Online follow-up visit after 1 year of first in-person visit.
Levels.re-eval online follow: Online follow-up visit after 1 year of second in-person visit.

age_at_visit.Description: Age of the participant at the time of visit.

LITTLE_INTEREST.Description: a. Little interest or pleasure in doing things

FEELING_DOWN.Description: b. Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless

TROUBLE_SLEEPING.Description: c. Trouble falling/staying asleep, sleeping too much

FEELING_TIRED.Description: d. Feeling tired or having little energy

FEELING_BAD.Description: f. Feeling bad about yourself or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down

TROUBLE_CONCENTRATING.Description: g. Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television

MOVING_OR_SPEAKING.Description: h. Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite--being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual

BETTER_OFF_DEAD.Description: i. Thoughts that you would be better off dead or of hurting yourself in some way

ANY_PROB_HOW_DIFF_DO_ACT.Description: 2. If you checked off any problems on this questionnaire so far, how difficult have these problems made it for you to do your work, take care of things at home, or get along with other people?
